rebuild_manifest.source_file: D:\汇度编辑部1\项目文章\2026项目表\卫材\仑卡奈单抗\2026 ADPD\Hiramatsu_Reduction of AB PF Correlation_ADPD v8 FINAL.pdf
rebuild_manifest.product_id: 仑卡奈单抗Aβ原纤维机制
rebuild_manifest.product_name_zh: 仑卡奈单抗 Aβ 原纤维机制
rebuild_manifest.rebuild_scope: ADPD 2026 Hiramatsu 海报最小证据包

v2_sources.title: Reduction of brain Aβ protofibrils by lecanemab correlates with CSF pTau217 and neuronal/synaptic biomarkers in APPNL-G-F/MAPT double knock-in mice
v2_sources.citation: Hiramatsu N, Kubo A, Shuta K, et al. ADPD 2026 Poster #1627.

v2_facts.definition: Male APPNL-G-F/MAPT double knock-in mice received weekly intraperitoneal injections of mAb158 for 16 weeks from 6 months of age.
v2_facts.definition_zh: 6月龄雄性 APPNL-G-F/MAPT 双敲入小鼠接受 mAb158 每周腹腔注射，共 16 周。
v2_facts.value: mAb158 is a murine version of lecanemab; 3 and 10 mg/kg

v2_facts.definition: Administration of mAb158 significantly reduced Aβ plaques and CSF pTau217, total tau and neurogranin in APPNL-G-F/MAPT dKI mice.
v2_facts.definition_zh: mAb158 给药可显著降低 Aβ 斑块以及 CSF pTau217、total tau 和 neurogranin。

v2_facts.definition: Administration of mAb158 significantly reduced brain Aβ protofibrils in a dose-dependent manner.
v2_facts.definition_zh: mAb158 可剂量依赖性降低脑内 Aβ 原纤维。
v2_facts.value: Dose-dependent reduction of brain Aβ PF

v2_facts.definition: Brain Aβ protofibrils correlated with CSF pTau217, total tau and neurogranin.
v2_facts.definition_zh: 脑内 Aβ 原纤维与 CSF pTau217、total tau 和 neurogranin 存在相关性。
v2_facts.value: pTau217 r=0.748; total tau r=0.800; neurogranin r=0.622

v2_facts.definition: Correlation between CSF pTau217 and Aβ protofibrils was significantly higher than that with Aβ plaques, insoluble Aβ42 or insoluble N3pE-42 Aβ.
v2_facts.definition_zh: CSF pTau217 与 Aβ 原纤维的相关性显著高于其与 Aβ 斑块、不可溶 Aβ42 或不可溶 N3pE-42 Aβ 的相关性。
v2_facts.value: Aβ plaque r=0.625; insoluble Aβ42 r=0.310 (p=0.0837); insoluble N3pE-42 Aβ r=0.008 (p=0.9672)

v2_facts.definition: Administration of mAb158 significantly reduced LAMP1 reactivity, and LAMP1 correlated with Aβ plaque.
v2_facts.definition_zh: mAb158 可显著降低 LAMP1 反应性，且 LAMP1 与 Aβ 斑块相关。
v2_facts.value: LAMP1 correlated with Aβ plaque at r=0.917, p<0.0001
